title: Teens’ Experiences on TikTok, Instagram and Snapchat
summary_en: Teens largely turn to TikTok, Instagram and Snapchat for fun and connection. But experiences around messaging, screen time and cyberbullying vary. And what teens say about how these sites impact their mental health.
title_cn: 皮尤研究中心发布美国青少年使用TikTok、Instagram、Snapchat体验专项研究报告

title: Americans’ views of China have grown somewhat more positive in recent years
summary_en: Most Americans still view China negatively, but a recent survey shows favorability has ticked up, especially among Democrats and younger adults. Fewer now call China an enemy.
title_cn: 皮尤研究中心发布调查显示近年美国民众对华好感度有所上升
summary_cn: 皮尤研究中心近期发布相关调查结果显示，过去十余年多数美国民众对华持负面看法的整体态势目前仍未改变，但对华持有好感的民众占比已出现小幅上升。本次调查结果基于该中心2026年开展的两次面向美国成年民众的调研，其中3月23日至29日调研覆盖3507名受访者，1月20日至26日调研覆盖8512名受访者，所有受访者均为该中心美国趋势小组成员，样本可代表美国全体成年民众的观点。

title: Local News Fact Sheet
summary_en: Americans’ attention to local news has declined since 2016. Explore how people get local news today, shifting from TV and print to digital sources.
title_cn: 皮尤-奈特倡议发布美国地方新闻现状情况简报

title: Most new data centers in the U.S. are coming to rural areas
summary_en: Over 1,500 new data centers are in development nationwide. Most will be built in rural areas, particularly the South and Midwest, marking a shift from urban locations.
title_cn: 皮尤研究中心报告显示美国多数新建数据中心将落户农村地区
